title: NA-Non ULIP
word_text:
Why Term Insurance Plans May Be Necessary?
Life insurance may be considered to be one of the popular instruments that individuals may include in their financial plans. The reason may be that life insurance offers one’s family, financial security in their absence.
Term insurance may be considered to be a type of life insurance policy that offers coverage for a specified period. It may be considered one of the affordable plans offering life insurance coverage. If you may be wondering about the importance of term insurance and why you should have it, read further.
What is the Importance Of Term Insurance and Is it Necessary?
Each type of life insurance may have distinct features that meet the needs of a certain set of consumers. When it comes to term insurance, below are the reasons that these may be popular and essential:
Financially secures your family
Term insurance may be an good way to provide financial security to your family. If you breathe your last unexpectedly, your family may be left without a source of income to meet their daily needs, pay bills, and take care of any other financial obligations. Term insurance may provide a death benefit to your beneficiaries, which may be used to pay off debts, take care of daily expenses, and ensure that your family has financial stability.
Offers coverage at an affordable cost
One of the primary reasons to buy term insurance may be that it offers a high sum assured at a low cost. Since the policy provides coverage for a limited period, the premiums may be significantly lower than other types of life insurance policies. This means that you may get a more substantial coverage amount for a relatively small premium, which may be ideal for those looking for pocket-friendly life insurance.
Provides life cover for a specified tenure
Term insurance provides coverage for a specific period which you may choose based on your financial planning. For instance, if you have young children, you can opt for a policy that provides coverage until they reach a certain age or until they become financially independent. Ensure that you choose a sufficient tenure since, once your term insurance matures, buying a new one at an older age may be expensive.
Easy to understand
Several types of life insurance plans come with investments or saving components. These plans may seem a bit complex since they may have an investment angle to them which often needs to be tracked. On the other hand, a term insurance plan is solely a pure life insurance plan without any maturity value (the exception being term insurance with return of premium, which may offer the policyholder the total of all premiums paid on plan maturity). Being a pure life insurance plan with no savings or investment element, a term plan may be quite simple to understand and maintain.
Reduces stress
The true importance of term insurance reflects in the main purpose for which you buy it. For many people, the purpose may be to have a financial backup for their loved ones in their absence. It may not be easy to think about your mortality but planning for it may be essential. Knowing that you have secured your family’s future may allow you to live a stress-free life.
Once you may have made up your mind to buy a term insurance plan, the next question would be how to buy one. You can buy one either online or offline.
Why You May Buy Term Insurance Online?
Term insurance may usually be a long-term financial product that directly affects you and your family. You may want to ensure that you choose the right plan and read the fine print. Below are some reasons to buy term insurance online-
Convenient to purchase
One of the primary reasons to buy term insurance online may be the convenience it offers. You may research and compare different term plans from the comfort of your home, without having to visit insurance agents or company branches. With online term insurance, you may be able to complete the entire process, from comparing policies to making the purchase, in just a few clicks. You may use a term insurance calculator online to figure out your coverage needs.
Cost-effective
Buying term insurance online may be cost-effective as there may be no intermediaries involved. When you buy term insurance from an agent, you may have to pay a commission, which may usually be a percentage of and inclusive in the premium amount. However, with online term insurance, you can save on these commissions, making the policy more affordable.
Choose without any pressure
Online term insurance policies offer a high level of customization. You can select the policy term, coverage amount, and riders based on your specific needs and budget. When you buy a term plan through an agent, sometimes, it may be easy to get swayed into making a wrong decision, be it choosing the wrong amount of coverage or insurance provider. When you buy a term plan online, you have sufficient time to do your research and buy a plan at your own pace.
Transparency
One of the reasons to consider buying term insurance online is that you may be aware of everything regarding your plan. Buying a plan online may offer transparency in terms of policy details, premium amounts, and terms and conditions. You may compare policies from different insurance providers and choose the one that meets your specific needs and budget. You can read through the detailed description of the policy features and benefits, to make an informed decision.
Easy to buy and manage
When you buy term insurance online, you are likely to receive the policy document instantly via email. Along with the paperwork being done online, managing your policy may also be easy. You may simply pay your premiums online from the comfort of your home and manage your policy as and when required.
Term insurance plans are pure life insurance policies whose affordability may make them a must-have. If you are considering buying one, read the fine print and choose a plan that meets your financial goals.
Disclaimer -
The views stated in this article are not to be construed as investment advice and readers are suggested to seek independent financial advice before making any investment decisions. For more details on risk factors, terms and conditions please read the sales brochure & policy document (available on www.bajajallianzlife.com) carefully before concluding a sale. full_pdf_text:
Why Term Insurance Plans may be considered necessary?
Life insurance may be considered to be one of the important instruments that individuals may include in their financial planning as it may provide financial security to their families in their absence. Term insurance may be considered to be a type of life insurance policy that offers coverage for a specified period. It may be considered one of the affordable plans offering life insurance coverage. If you may be wondering about the importance of term insurance and why you should have it, read further. What is the Importance of Term Insurance? Each type of life insurance may have distinct features that meet the needs of a certain set of consumers. When it comes to term insurance, below are some of the reasons that these may be popular and are considered essential: 1. Financially secures your family
Term insurance may be one of the ways to provide financial security to your family. If you breathe your last unexpectedly, your family may be left without a source of income to meet their daily needs, pay bills, and take care of any other financial obligations. Term insurance may provide a death benefit to your nominees, which may be used to pay off debts, take care of daily expenses, and ensure that your family has financial stability. 2. Offers coverage at an affordable cost
Primary reason to buy term insurance may be that it offers optimum sum assured at affordable premium cost. Since the policy provides coverage for a limited period, the premiums may be lower than other types of life insurance policies. This means that you may get a substantial coverage amount for a relatively small premium, which may be preferable for those looking for pocket- friendly life insurance. 3. Provides life cover for a specified tenure
Term insurance provides coverage for a specific period which you may choose based on your financial requirements. For instance, if you have young children, you can opt for a policy that provides coverage until they reach a certain age or until they become financially independent. Ensure that you choose a sufficient tenure since, once your term insurance matures, buying a new one at an older age may be expensive. 4. Easy to understand
Several types of life insurance plans come with investments or saving components. However, a term insurance plan is solely a pure life insurance plan without any maturity value (except a term insurance plan with return of premium option, wherein the total of all premiums is paid on plan
maturity of the policy). Being a pure life insurance plan with no savings or investment element, a term plan may be quite simple to understand and maintain. 5. Peace of Mind
The importance of term insurance is based on the main purpose for which you buy it. For some people, the purpose may be to have a future financial security for their loved ones in their absence. It may not be easy to think about your mortality but planning for it may be essential. Knowing that you have secured your family’s financial future may allow you peace of mind.. Once you may have decided to buy a term insurance plan, the next question would be how to buy one? You can buy a term insurance plan through two different modes either online or offline. Why you may consider buying Term Insurance Online? Term insurance may usually be a long-term financial product that directly affects you and your family. Below are some reasons to buy term insurance online- 1. Convenient to purchase
One of the primary reasons to buy term insurance online may be the convenience it offers. You may research and compare different term plans from the comfort of your home. With online term insurance, you may be able to complete the entire process, from comparing policies to making the purchase, in just a few clicks. You may use a term insurance calculator online to figure out your coverage needs. 2. Cost-effective
When buying a term insurance policy online, the commission cost payable to the intermediaries is eliminated. As a result, the premium payable may reduce, making it more affordable for you. 3. Customize your plan instantly
When buying term insurance online, you can make changes to the required policy tenure, coverage amount and other features of the plan to check its impact on the premium instantly. With resulting changes appearing in real time, your buying decision can conclude faster. When you buy a term plan online, you have sufficient time to do your research and buy a plan at your own pace. You can select the policy term, coverage amount, and riders based on your specific needs and budget after comparing multiple available options online from the comfort of your home. 4. Compare different policies
When buying a plan online, policy details like coverage, premium amounts, terms and conditions, etc. will be available at the click of a button. This may make it easier for you to compare policies from different insurance providers online and choose the one that meets your specific needs and budget.
5. Easy to buy and manage
When you buy term insurance online, you are likely to receive the policy document instantly via email. Along with the paperwork being done online, managing your policy may also be easy. Term insurance plans are pure life insurance policies whose affordability may make them a must-have. If you are considering buying one, read the fine print and choose a plan that meets your financial goals.
